com.tonic.jaloc.impl.maps

Class PMap<K,V>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeMap<PMap.Slot>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.maps.PMap<K,V>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PMap<K,V>
extends AbstractNativeMap<PMap.Slot>
    A native primitive-to-primitive hash map; the StructType pair fixes the key and value types, K and V are declaration metadata only.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  PMap.Slot
      The internal entry view backing the map; not for direct use.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PMap(NativeAllocator allocator, StructType keyType, StructType valueType, long expectedElements)
      Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the given allocator.
      PMap(StructType keyType, StructType valueType)
      Creates an empty map for the given key and value types on the system allocator.
      PMap(StructType keyType, StructType valueType, long expectedElements)
      Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the system allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void forEachKey(java.util.function.DoubleConsumer consumer)
      Emits every key; floating-keyed maps only.
      void forEachKey(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
      Emits every key; integral-keyed maps only.

      Reads the value for key.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PMap

        public PMap(StructType keyType,
            StructType valueType)
        Creates an empty map for the given key and value types on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        keyType - the key type, any StructType but BOOLEAN
        valueType - the value type
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if keyType is BOOLEAN

      • PMap

        public PMap(StructType keyType,
            StructType valueType,
            long expectedElements)
        Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        keyType - the key type, any StructType but BOOLEAN
        valueType - the value type
        expectedElements - presizes the table
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if keyType is BOOLEAN or expectedElements is negative

      • PMap

        public PMap(NativeAllocator allocator,
            StructType keyType,
            StructType valueType,
            long expectedElements)
        Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        keyType - the key type, any StructType but BOOLEAN
        valueType - the value type
        expectedElements - presizes the table
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if keyType is BOOLEAN or expectedElements is negative

    • Method Detail

      • put

        public void put(long key,
                long value)
        Maps key to value, replacing any existing mapping.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        value - the value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if key or value does not fit its declared type
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • getByte

        public byte getByte(long key)
        Reads the value for key.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        the value
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if key is absent
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key or value type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • getOrDefault

        public long getOrDefault(long key,
                         long defaultValue)
        Reads the value for key, or defaultValue when absent.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        defaultValue - the fallback
        Returns:
        the value, or defaultValue
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key or value type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • forEachKey

        public void forEachKey(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
        Emits every key; integral-keyed maps only.
        Parameters:
        consumer - the receiver
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if consumer is null
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the key type is floating
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • forEachKey

        public void forEachKey(java.util.function.DoubleConsumer consumer)
        Emits every key; floating-keyed maps only.
        Parameters:
        consumer - the receiver
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if consumer is null
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the key type is integral
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
